sections.paragraph:
Original: מלאכה

Transliteration: melâ'kâh

Phonetic: mel-aw-kaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. occupation, work, business
    1. occupation, business
    2. property
    3. work (something done or made)
    4. workmanship
    5. service, use
    6. public business
      1. political
      2. religious

Origin: from the same as H4397

TWOT entry: 1068b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
